name: wannacri
documentation:
[![Version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/wannacri.svg)](https://pypi.org/project/WannaCRI)

WannaCRI
========
A (WIP) Python library for parsing, extracting, and generating Criware's various audio and video file formats.
If you're interested in reading more about USM, you can read my write-up about it [here](https://listed.to/@donmai/24921/criware-s-usm-format-part-1)

Support
=======
This currently supports the following formats with more planned:

✅: Implemented and tested ❓: Should work but not tested ❌: Not implemented

x/y: Extract support / Create support

## USM

### Video

| Codec | Not-encrypted | Encrypted |
| ----- | ----- |-----------|
| VP9 | ✅ / ✅  | ✅ / ✅     |
| H.264 | ✅ / ✅ | ✅ / ❓     |
| Prime | ❓ / ❌ | ❓ / ❌     |

### Audio

| Codec | Not-encrypted | Encrypted |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| CRI HCA | ✅ / ❌ | ✅ / ❌ |

Requirements
============
This library has the following requirements:

A working FFmpeg and FFprobe installation. On Windows, you can download official ffmpeg and ffprobe binaries and place them on your path.

This project heavily uses the [ffmpeg-python](https://pypi.org/project/ffmpeg-python) wrapper. And uses [python-json-logger](https://pypi.org/project/python-json-logger) for logging.

Usage
=====
If installed, there should be a command-line tool available.

For extracting USMs:

`wannacri extractusm /path/to/usm/file/or/folder --key 0xKEYUSEDIFENCRYPTED`

For creating USMs:

`wannacri createusm /path/to/vp9/file --key 0xKEYIFYOUWANTTOENCRYPT`

Licence
=======
This is an open-sourced application licensed under the MIT License

class_variables.name: wannacri.codec.Sofdec2Codec.PRIME
documentation: MPEG2

methods.name: wannacri.usm.chunk.UsmChunk.padding
documentation: The number of byte padding a chunk will have when packed.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.chunk.UsmChunk.__len__
documentation: Returns the packed length of a chunk. Including _padding.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.chunk.UsmChunk.from_bytes
documentation: Initialise UsmChunk from raw bytes.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.chunk.UsmChunk.pack
documentation: Transform UsmChunk to raw bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.slugify
documentation:
Taken from https://github.com/django/django/blob/master/django/utils/text.py
with modifications. Convert to ASCII if 'allow_unicode' is False.
Convert spaces or repeated dashes to single dashes. Remove characters that
aren't alphanumerics, underscores, dots, commas, pluses, or hyphens. Convert to lowercase.
Also strip leading and trailing whitespace, dashes, and underscores.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.is_valid_chunk
documentation:
Check if the first four bytes of a chunk are valid Usm chunks.
Returns true if valid, and false if invalid or the given input is less
than four bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.is_payload_list_pages
documentation: Checks if payload is a list of UsmPage which has a signature of '@UTF' at the beginning.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.generate_keys
documentation:
Taken from Usm.crid, adapted for Python 3.
Takes a integer that can fit in at most 8 bytes and generates 2 keys.
Returns 2 bytes type in the following order: Video key and audios key.
Video key has length of 0x40 bytes, and audios key has length of 0x20 bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.decrypt_video_packet
documentation:
Decrypt an encrypted videos stream payload. Skips decryption if packet is
less than 0x240 bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.encrypt_video_packet
documentation:
Encrypt an encrypted videos stream payload. Skips decryption if packet is
less than 0x240 bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools._crypt_audio_packet
documentation:
Encrypt/decrypt a plaintext/encrypted audios stream payload. Skips encryption/decryption
if packet is less than or equal to 0x140 bytes.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.pad_to_next_sector
documentation: TODO: Rename this to get_metadata_end_offset
TODO: Generalize to multiple CD sectors

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.video_sink
documentation:
A generator for videos chunk payloads. Takes a handle of a usm file, a mutex,
a list of tuples of a chunk payload's offset and size, and a list of keyframes'
frame number.

Yields the raw chunk payload and a bool whether the frame is a keyframe or not.
All in chronological order.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.tools.audio_sink
documentation:
A generator for audios chunk payloads. Takes a handle of a usm file, a mutex,
and a list of tuples of a chunk payload's offset and size.

Yields the raw chunk payload in chronological order.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.media.audio.GenericAudio
documentation:
Generic audios container used for storing audios
channels in Usm files. Use other containers when creating
USMs from audios files.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.media.video.GenericVideo
documentation:
Generic videos container used for storing videos
channels in Usm files. Use other containers when creating
USMs from videos files.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmMedia

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmMedia.crid_page
documentation: A Usm videos or audios's CRIUSF_DIR_STREAM page.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmMedia.metadata_pages
documentation:
An optional list of Usm pages used for Usm Video's
VIDEO_SEEKINFO and Usm Audio's AUDIO_HDRINFO.

UsmVideos generated from videos should return None for
the Usm class' pack method to generate and assign VIDEO_SEEKINFO.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmMedia.filename
documentation:
A slugified filename, which is stored inside the crid_page.
Handles case where stored filename is actually a path.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmMedia.__len__
documentation: The number of packets a Usm videos or audios has.

Base protocol for UsmVideo and UsmAudio protocols. Contains
properties and methods common for both of these protocols.

See this protocol attributes that needs to be implemented to take advantage
of default method implementations.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmVideo

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmVideo.stream
documentation:
A generator of bytes from the videos file source
and a bool which is true when the current packet is a keyframe.
By default it returns raw bytes but given a mode and key,
the function generates encrypted or decrypted bytes.

Args:
    mode: An optional OpMode that instructs the generator
        to encrypt, decrypt, or leave the packets as-is from
        the source videos file. Defaults to OpMode.NONE.
    key: An optional bytes object required for encrypting
        or decrypting the videos packets. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: When key is not supplied when mode is set
        to encrypt or decrypt. And when mode is an unknown
        operation.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmVideo.chunks
documentation:
A generator of UsmChunks to be consumed for a Usm file
and a bool which is true when the current packet is a keyframe.
At the last packet, two UsmChunk are generated. The second one
is a SECTION_END payload for the respective Usm video.
In total this method will yield len(self) chunks.

By default it generates chunks from raw bytes of the videos
source but given a mode and key, the function generates
encrypted or decrypted chunks.

Args:
    mode: An optional OpMode that instructs the generator
        to encrypt, decrypt, or leave as-is the packets from
        the source videos file. Defaults to OpMode.NONE.
    key: An optional bytes object required for encrypting
        or decrypting the videos packets. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: When key is not supplied when mode is set
        to encrypt or decrypt.

Required protocol for videos objects to be used in Usm generation.
See UsmMedia protocol for more properties and methods required.

Explicitly inherit this protocol and implement UsmVideo and
UsmMedia's attributes to use some or all the default methods.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmAudio

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmAudio.stream
documentation:
A generator of bytes from the audios file source.
By default it returns raw bytes but given a mode and key,
the function generates encrypted or decrypted bytes.

Args:
    mode: An optional OpMode that instructs the generator
        to encrypt, decrypt, or leave the packets as-is from
        the source audios file. Defaults to OpMode.NONE.
    key: An optional bytes object required for encrypting
        or decrypting the audios packets. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: When key is not supplied when mode is set
        to encrypt or decrypt. And when mode is an unknown
        operation.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.media.protocols.UsmAudio.chunks
documentation:
A generator of UsmChunks to be consumed for a Usm file.
The last generated UsmChunk is a SECTION_END payload for
the respective Usm audios. In total this method will yield
len(self) + 1 chunks.

By default it generates chunks from raw bytes of the audios
source but given a mode and key, the function generates
encrypted or decrypted chunks.

Params:
    mode: An optional OpMode that instructs the generator
        to encrypt, decrypt, or leave as-is the packets from
        the source audios file. Defaults to OpMode.NONE.
    key: An optional bytes object required for encrypting
        or decrypting the audios packets. Defaults to None.

Raises:
    ValueError: When key is not supplied when mode is set
        to encrypt or decrypt.

Required protocol for audios objects to be used in Usm generation.
See UsmMedia protocol for more properties and methods required.

Explicitly inherit this protocol and implement UsmAudio and
UsmMedia's attributes to use some or all the default methods.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.usm._chunk_helper
documentation:
Helper function for _process_chunks. Fills default_dict_ch with information about
the passed chunk and offset.

functions.name: wannacri.usm.usm._process_chunks
documentation:
Helper function that reads all the chunks in a USM file and returns a tuple of
1. A list of USM pages about the contents of the USM file.
2. A dictionary of USM video channels.
3. A dictionary of USM audio channels.
4. A dictionary of USM alpha video channels.

classes.name: wannacri.usm.usm.UsmChannel
documentation:
Intermediate class for holding information on a UsmVideo
and UsmAudio from a parsed Usm.

methods.name: wannacri.usm.usm.Usm.demux
documentation: Saves all videos, audios, alpha videos, pages (depending on configuration) of a Usm.

functions.name: wannacri.wannacri.extract_usm
documentation:
One of the main functions in the command-line program. Extracts a USM or extracts
multiple USMs given a path as input.

functions.name: wannacri.wannacri.probe_usm
documentation:
One of the main functions in the command-line program. Probes a USM or finds
multiple USMs and probes them when given a path as input.

functions.name: wannacri.wannacri.find_usm
documentation: Walks a path to find USMs.

functions.name: wannacri.wannacri.find_ffprobe
documentation: Find ffprobe.exe in given path.
